title: Resource Compression
description: Save space by compressing Vanilla Blocks.
body:
## Save space by compressing Vanilla Blocks.
#### Features - Nearly all Blocks - Compress them up to Level 9 #### Missing Blocks - Glass #### If you find any issues, report them [here](https://github.com/Stein-N/Resource-Compression/issues) #### Also check out my other "Resource" Mods: [Resource Cracker/Tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/resource-cracker)
